name: Mercenaries 2 QoL Mods
description: Quality-of-life ASI mods for Mercenaries 2: World in Flames.

mods.name: Windowed Mode
mods.description: Forces D3D9 windowed mode (min 1280x720) by hooking IDirect3D9::CreateDevice.

mods.name: Quiet Freeplay VO
mods.description: Mutes or throttles the idle "nag" and proximity/POI voice-over; leaves mission dialog alone. Configurable via quiet_freeplay_vo.ini.
